name: NVIDIA NemoClaw
description: Open-source security runtime for multi-agent AI. Enforces policy-based access control, sandboxes kernel interactions, and privacy-routes sensitive data for enterprise local inference.

skills.name: Enforce policy-based access control at the agent boundary, restricting which tools and data each agent can reach
skills.description: Enforce policy-based access control at the agent boundary, restricting which tools and data each agent can reach

skills.name: Sandbox kernel-level interactions to prevent privilege escalation and contain runaway agents
skills.description: Sandbox kernel-level interactions to prevent privilege escalation and contain runaway agents

skills.name: Route sensitive data through privacy-preserving channels so PII never reaches untrusted model endpoints
skills.description: Route sensitive data through privacy-preserving channels so PII never reaches untrusted model endpoints

skills.name: Orchestrate trust levels across multi-agent hierarchies with per-agent permission scopes and audit trails
skills.description: Orchestrate trust levels across multi-agent hierarchies with per-agent permission scopes and audit trails

skills.name: Detect and alert on anomalous agent behavior patterns using real-time threat fingerprinting
skills.description: Detect and alert on anomalous agent behavior patterns using real-time threat fingerprinting
